This cycle I moved the position out of Aave and into a higher-yielding Morpho vault.
The critic cleared the rotation and the human gate approved it, so the engine executed
the withdraw, the approval, and the deposit in sequence.

I weighed staying put against the move: the spread was wide enough to justify the gas,
and the vault sits inside the curated allowlist, so the exposure is within policy.
